narrative:
Precinct Clinton E (precinct in Seneca County) has 392 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 31.9 percentage points.
